src: [MIRROR, PRs ok! Issues: https://git.lix.systems/lix-project/lix/issues] A modern, delicious implementation of the Nix package manager, focused on correctness, usability, and growth — and committed to doing right by its community
ja: 【ミラー、PR 歓迎！Issues: https://git.lix.systems/lix-project/lix/issues】正確性・使いやすさ・成長にフォーカスし、コミュニティへの誠実さを大切にする、モダンで洗練された Nix パッケージマネージャの実装
